topics.title: Dr. Phil and Match.com Partnership
topics.summary: The studio critiques Dr. Phil’s commercial ventures and his partnership with Match.com while reacting to a radio segment regarding modern dating and gender roles.

topics.title: Phone Sex Industry Insights
topics.summary: The studio features a call with a phone sex operator named Kissy Fur, who discusses her work habits, her interactions with a regular caller known as "the badass," and the logistics of the industry.

topics.title: Phone Sex Interview with Kissyfur
topics.summary: The studio hosts a phone sex segment featuring a caller named Kissyfur while the hosts discuss her appearance, professional fees, and upcoming scheduled appearances.

topics.title: Death Threats and Match.com Lawsuit
topics.summary: The studio discusses the arrest of an individual accused of sending death threats to Chauncey Hayden, as well as a federal lawsuit against Match.com for fraudulent marketing practices.

topics.title: Sirius Canada Expansion and Train Performance Review
topics.summary: The show discusses the inclusion of Howard Stern on Sirius Canada, reviews recent performances by the band Train, and shares listener feedback regarding various segments.

topics.title: Interview with Jenna Jamison
topics.summary: The studio hosts a candid conversation with adult film star Jenna Jamison regarding her career transitions, personal life, and experiences in the industry.

topics.title: Jenna Jamison and Las Vegas Encounters
topics.summary: The show features a guest recounting intimate encounters in Las Vegas with Jenny McCarthy and the use of a vibrating device during a live broadcast.

topics.title: Diddy Discusses Career and New Fragrance
topics.summary: The studio features a conversation with Diddy regarding his new cologne, his past experiences in the music industry, and the circumstances surrounding the death of The Notorious B.I.G.

topics.title: Perfume Promotion and Financial Security
topics.summary: The studio explores a failed perfume promotion involving Sal, discusses the financial status and psychological outlook of guest Danny Bonaducci, and reflects on past show highlights.

topics.title: Radio Industry Salaries and Personal Relationships
topics.summary: The show explores the financial realities of radio contracts, personal marital struggles regarding infidelity, and the costs associated with satellite radio subscriptions.

topics.title: Infomercial Commentary and News Updates
topics.summary: The show features a critique of an adult toy infomercial followed by a transition to news reports regarding legal charges in a death threat case.

topics.title: The Pitfalls of Celebrity DJing
topics.summary: The studio explores the high costs and lack of results associated with hiring celebrity DJs for private events, contrasting them with more practical musical choices.

topics.title: State of the Union and Celebrity Commentary
topics.summary: The studio discusses various topics including celebrity fitness, personal relationships, and highlights from the President's State of the Union address regarding Iraq and energy policy.

topics.title: Academy Award Nominations and International Politics
topics.summary: The studio discusses the 2008 Academy Award nominees, including films like Walk the Line and Crash, while also touching on news regarding Bob Woodruff, a survey on golf versus sex, and Italian politician Silvio Berlusconi's campaign promises.
